scripts.pre-deploy: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: echo 'Use deploy-prep.sh instead for proper branch workflow' && exit 1
scripts.release:minor: echo 'Use deploy-prep.sh instead for proper branch workflow' && exit 1
scripts.release:major: echo 'Use deploy-prep.sh instead for proper branch workflow' && exit 1
scripts.quick-release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump patch version'
scripts.quick-release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump minor version'
scripts.quick-release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m 'chore: bump major version'
scripts.check-deployment: npm run lint && npm run build && echo 'Ready for deployment!'
